command: fabio workspace create --name "Analytics Dev" --description "Development workspace for analytics team"
description: Creates a new Fabric workspace. Returns the workspace object without capacity (assign separately).
notes: Workspace is created without capacity. Use 'fabio workspace assign-capacity --id $WS --capacity $CAP_ID' to assign. Capacity is required before creating items that need compute (notebooks, warehouses, SQL databases).

query_examples.description: Get the workspace ID for subsequent commands.
